member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that configures a visualizer to plot each element of the sequence as a bar graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphBuilder.IndexSelector
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the property that will be used as index for the graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphBuilder.ValueSelector
member.summary: Gets or sets the names of the properties that will be displayed in the graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphBuilder.BaseAxis
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying the axis on which the bars in the graph will be displayed.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphBuilder.BarType
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying how the different bars in the graph will be visually arranged.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphBuilder.CurveSettings
member.summary: Gets the optional settings for each bar added to the graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphBuilder.Capacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional capacity used for rolling bar graphs. If no capacity is specified, all data points will be displayed.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphBuilder.Min
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying a fixed lower limit for the bar range axis. If no fixed range is specified, the graph limits can be edited online.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphBuilder.Max
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying a fixed upper limit for the bar range axis. If no fixed range is specified, the graph limits can be edited online.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphBuilder.Build(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Linq.Expressions.Expression})
member.summary: Builds the expression tree for configuring and calling the bar graph visualizer on the specified input argument.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphOverlay
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer used to overlay a sequence of values as a bar graph.

member.name: F:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphView.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphView.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphView.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer to display an object as a bar graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphVisualizer.Capacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of data points displayed at any one moment in the bar graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphVisualizer.Min
member.summary: Gets or sets the lower limit for the bar range axis when using a fixed scale.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphVisualizer.Max
member.summary: Gets or sets the upper limit for the bar range axis when using a fixed scale.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.BarGraphVisualizer.AutoScale
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the bar range scale should be recalculated automatically as the graph updates.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.CurveConfiguration
member.summary: Represents common configuration properties for individual curves in a graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.CurveConfiguration.Label
member.summary: Gets or sets the label that will appear in the legend.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.CurveConfiguration.Color
member.summary: Gets or sets the color of the curve.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.CurveConfiguration.ColorHtml
member.summary: Gets or sets an HTML representation of the curve color value for serialization.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphControl
member.summary: Provides a dynamic graph control with a built-in color cycle palette.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphControl.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphControl.AutoScaleAxis
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to recalculate the axis range automatically when redrawing the graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphControl.MouseDown
member.summary: Occurs when the mouse pointer is over the control and a mouse button is pressed.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphControl.MouseUp
member.summary: Occurs when the mouse pointer is over the control and a mouse button is released.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphControl.MouseMove
member.summary: Occurs when the mouse pointer is moved over the control.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphControl.GetNextColor
member.summary: Returns the next color in the color cycle, and increments the color index.
member.returns: A value representing the next color in the color cycle.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphControl.GetColor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the color in the color cycle at the specified index.
member.param: The index of the color to retrieve.
member.returns: A value representing the color at the specified index of the color cycle.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphControl.ResetColorCycle
member.summary: Resets the color cycle to the first color in the palette.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphControl.SetLayout(ZedGraph.PaneLayout)
member.summary: Sets the auto layout strategy for graphs with multiple panes.
member.param: Specifies the auto layout options for graphs with multiple panes.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphControl.SetLayout(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the number of rows and columns in the layout explicitly for graphs with multiple panes.
member.param: The number of rows in the pane layout.
The number of columns in the pane layout.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphControl.GetNormalizedRectangle(System.Drawing.RectangleF,System.Drawing.Point,System.Drawing.Point)
member.summary: Computes a rectangle defined by the specified points which is also contained inside the pane boundaries.
member.param: The bounds of the pane on which to contain the rectangle.
The first point defining the selected rectangle.
The second point defining the selected rectangle.
member.returns: A which is contained inside the pane boundaries and is defined by the specified points.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphControl.UpdateRubberBand(System.Drawing.Rectangle,System.Drawing.Rectangle)
member.summary: Updates the state of the rubber band selection overlay.
member.param: The location and size of the rubber band selection.
The region of the control that should be invalidated following the rubber band update operation. See the method.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that specifies a mashup graph panel that can be used to combine multiple plots sharing the same axes.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelBuilder.XMin
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying a fixed lower limit for the X-axis range. If no fixed range is specified, the graph limits can be edited online.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelBuilder.XMax
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying a fixed upper limit for the X-axis range. If no fixed range is specified, the graph limits can be edited online.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelBuilder.YMin
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying a fixed lower limit for the Y-axis range. If no fixed range is specified, the graph limits can be edited online.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelBuilder.YMax
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying a fixed upper limit for the Y-axis range. If no fixed range is specified, the graph limits can be edited online.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelBuilder.Build(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Linq.Expressions.Expression})
member.summary: Builds the expression tree for configuring and calling the graph panel visualizer.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelBuilderBase
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class with common mashup graph panel functionality.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelBuilderBase.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the visualizer window.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelBuilderBase.ReverseX
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying whether the scale values are reversed on the X-axis.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelBuilderBase.ReverseY
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying whether the scale values are reversed on the Y-axis.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelBuilderBase.Span
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional maximum span of data displayed at any one moment in the graph. If no span is specified, all data points will be displayed.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelBuilderBase.Capacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional capacity used for rolling line graphs. If no capacity is specified, all data points will be displayed.

member.name: F:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelView.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelView.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelView.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer that can be used to overlay multiple plots sharing the same axes in a single graph panel.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelVisualizer.Span
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum span of data displayed at any one moment in the graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelVisualizer.Capacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of points displayed at any one moment in the graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelVisualizer.XMin
member.summary: Gets or sets the lower limit of the X-axis range when using a fixed scale.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelVisualizer.XMax
member.summary: Gets or sets the upper limit of the X-axis range when using a fixed scale.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelVisualizer.YMin
member.summary: Gets or sets the lower limit of the Y-axis range when using a fixed scale.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelVisualizer.YMax
member.summary: Gets or sets the upper limit of the Y-axis range when using a fixed scale.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelVisualizer.AutoScaleX
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the axis range should be recalculated automatically as the graph updates.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.GraphPanelVisualizer.AutoScaleY
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the axis range should be recalculated automatically as the graph updates.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that configures a visualizer to plot each element of the sequence as a line graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphBuilder.IndexSelector
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the property that will be used as index for the graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphBuilder.ValueSelector
member.summary: Gets or sets the names of the properties to be displayed in the graph. Each selected property must have a point pair compatible type.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphBuilder.SymbolType
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional symbol type to use for the line graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphBuilder.LineWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the width, in points, to be used for the line graph. Use a value of zero to hide the line.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphBuilder.CurveSettings
member.summary: Gets the optional settings for each line added to the graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphBuilder.Capacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional capacity used for rolling line graphs. If no capacity is specified, all data points will be displayed.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphBuilder.XMin
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying a fixed lower limit for the X-axis range. If no fixed range is specified, the graph limits can be edited online.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphBuilder.XMax
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying a fixed upper limit for the X-axis range. If no fixed range is specified, the graph limits can be edited online.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphBuilder.YMin
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying a fixed lower limit for the Y-axis range. If no fixed range is specified, the graph limits can be edited online.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphBuilder.YMax
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying a fixed upper limit for the Y-axis range. If no fixed range is specified, the graph limits can be edited online.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphBuilder.Build(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Linq.Expressions.Expression})
member.summary: Builds the expression tree for configuring and calling the line graph visualizer on the specified input argument.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphOverlay
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer used to overlay a sequence of points as a line graph.

member.name: F:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphView.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphView.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphView.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer to display an object as a line graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphVisualizer.Capacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of points displayed at any one moment in the graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphVisualizer.XMin
member.summary: Gets or sets the lower limit of the X-axis range when using a fixed scale.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphVisualizer.XMax
member.summary: Gets or sets the upper limit of the X-axis range when using a fixed scale.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphVisualizer.YMin
member.summary: Gets or sets the lower limit of the Y-axis range when using a fixed scale.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphVisualizer.YMax
member.summary: Gets or sets the upper limit of the Y-axis range when using a fixed scale.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphVisualizer.AutoScaleX
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the X-axis range should be recalculated automatically as the graph updates.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.LineGraphVisualizer.AutoScaleY
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the Y-axis range should be recalculated automatically as the graph updates.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that configures a visualizer to plot each element of the sequence as a rolling graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphBuilder.IndexSelector
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the property that will be used as index for the graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphBuilder.ValueSelector
member.summary: Gets or sets the names of the properties that will be displayed in the graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphBuilder.SymbolType
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional symbol type to use for the line graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphBuilder.LineWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the width, in points, to be used for the line graph. Use a value of zero to hide the line.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphBuilder.CurveSettings
member.summary: Gets the optional settings for each line added to the graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphBuilder.Capacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional capacity used for rolling line graphs. If no capacity is specified, all data points will be displayed.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphBuilder.Min
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying a fixed lower limit for the value axis. If no fixed range is specified, the graph limits can be edited online.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphBuilder.Max
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying a fixed upper limit for the value axis. If no fixed range is specified, the graph limits can be edited online.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphBuilder.Build(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Linq.Expressions.Expression})
member.summary: Builds the expression tree for configuring and calling the line graph visualizer on the specified input argument.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphOverlay
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer used to overlay a sequence of values as a rolling graph.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphPanelBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that specifies a mashup graph panel that can be used to combine multiple graphs displaying data over a shared axis.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphPanelBuilder.BaseAxis
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying the axis on which the bars in the graph will be displayed.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphPanelBuilder.BarType
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying how the different bars in the graph will be visually arranged.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphPanelBuilder.Min
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying a fixed lower limit for the axis range. If no fixed range is specified, the graph limits can be edited online.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphPanelBuilder.Max
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying a fixed upper limit for the axis range. If no fixed range is specified, the graph limits can be edited online.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphPanelBuilder.Build(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Linq.Expressions.Expression})
member.summary: Builds the expression tree for configuring and calling the graph panel visualizer.

member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphPanelVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer that can be used to overlay multiple plots sharing the same index axis in a single graph panel.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphPanelVisualizer.Span
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum span of data displayed at any one moment in the graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphPanelVisualizer.Capacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of points displayed at any one moment in the graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphPanelVisualizer.Min
member.summary: Gets or sets the lower limit of the axis range when using a fixed scale.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphPanelVisualizer.Max
member.summary: Gets or sets the upper limit of the axis range when using a fixed scale.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphPanelVisualizer.AutoScale
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the axis range should be recalculated automatically as the graph updates.

member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer to display an object as a rolling graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphVisualizer.Capacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of time points displayed at any one moment in the graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphVisualizer.Min
member.summary: Gets or sets the lower limit for the value axis when using a fixed scale.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphVisualizer.Max
member.summary: Gets or sets the upper limit for the value axis when using a fixed scale.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ZedGraph.RollingGraphVisualizer.AutoScale
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the value axis scale should be recalculated automatically as the graph updates.
